para_trans: Martyr Rajguru Chowk, Madam Cama Road
Reference: - General Administration Department, Government Order No. Transfer 2024 / P.S. No.35 / P.S. 3, D. 30.05.2024
By order under reference, Mr. Moreshwar Shankar Chorge, Clerk Typist, Rural Development Department
The inter-departmental transfer was made to the Law and Justice Department.
2. Now, by this order, Mr. Moreshwar Shankar Chorge, Clerk in the rank of Typist, Administrative
Partial changes were made in the reason and their revised posting was made in the Tribal Development Department.
3. Mr. Moreshwar Shankar Chorge should immediately join the Tribal Development Department.
The Government Order is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
